Class RateBasedAbsorber.StageResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.absorber.RateBasedAbsorber.StageResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
RateBasedAbsorber
public static class RateBasedAbsorber.StageResult extends Object implements Serializable
Stage-by-stage calculation result container.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
